messages.content: # Struggling to see or seeing too much while in cockpit view? Follow this guide!

# Step 1
> Press F1 until you see the cockpit with wheel view/cam.
# Step 2
> Place your mouse on the right side of the screen to open the App menu
# Step 3
> Search for "Onboard Settings" or "First Person Camera"

# Step 4
> Configure then save your FoV

# Step 5
> Click on the Assetto Corsa logo (top left) on the "Onboard settings" app to minimise it.

-# If you don't see the "Onboard" nor "First person" app.
-# Open the "App Shelf" and install the apps.
